Hoffenheim ended a nine-game winless run with a 3-1 victory over Holstein Kiel at the weekend. The German side have failed to win their last four home matches. Tottenham have won only two of their la...

Their woes on the availability front have seemingly worsened ahead of Thursday's Europa League clash with Hoffenheim, but Postecoglou should get some of his players back next month. CM: Lucas Bergvall - The teenage Swede has stood out amid Spurs' tumult and will continue in the side with Pape Sarr the latest to succumb to Tottenham's injury bug.
